Investment | Jesse Morley

Investment

What I offer.

I've written this guide to cover most scenarios — but if you have something different in mind, just get in touch and we can work something out.

With every wedding package

Planning support

An initial video consultation or coffee, timeline guidance, and a location scout for local weddings — so your day runs smoothly and we're set up for the best possible shots.

Edited gallery

A password-protected online gallery of professionally edited, print-ready images — plus a web-resolution download for sharing on social media.

Preview album

A selection of favourite images delivered within two weeks of your wedding, so you don't have to wait long to relive the day.

Full collection

Your complete edited gallery delivered within six weeks — every honest moment, beautifully made.

Packages

Up to 4 hours

Intimate

  • Elopements and intimate weddings (max 30 guests)
  • 150–250 edited images
  • Video consult and pre-wedding guidance
  • Location scout where possible
$2,500
Enquire

Up to 8 hours

Flexible

  • Start early or finish late — your choice
  • 400–500 edited images
  • Everything in the standard package
$3,700
Enquire

Up to 10 hours

Complete

  • Prep (both parties), ceremony, formals, reception, first dance
  • 500–700 edited images
  • Everything in the standard package
$4,260
Enquire

Engagement session — up to 2 hours

A relaxed pre-wedding shoot — a great way for us to get comfortable together, and a chance to test how your look reads on camera.

$1,000

or $800 added to any wedding package

Add-ons

35mm Film Coverage

For those who can't go past the warm, grainy charm of film. Three rolls of Kodak Portra + B&W woven through your day.

$400

Second Shooter

Capture additional angles of those once-only moments. Especially recommended when prep is happening across two separate locations.

$900

Travel

Travel within two hours of Sydney is included in all packages. Additional hours charged at $100/hr one way. Ask about interstate or international travel.

$100/hr

Fine Art Album

Printed by Atkins Lab on Kodak photographic paper with Italian bookbinding. Elegant etched linen cover. Size: 8 × 10.6".

From $630

Still not sure? Let's have a chat.

I'd love to arrange a quick video call to make sure I'm the right match for you.

Get in touch
Jesse Morley
About Work Investment Contact

Always was, always will be.

I acknowledge the Traditional Owners of the land where I work and live, the Gadigal people, and pay my respects to the Elders past and present. I celebrate the stories, culture and traditions of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Elders of all communities who also work and live on this land. Sovereignty has never been ceded.

© Jesse Morley. All rights reserved.
